text:
There once was a little rabbit named Ruby that lived in a green meadow far, far away. Ruby had a remarkable friends group. She had Benny, the wise old owl, Poppy the gentlehog piglet, and Tizzy the tiny hummingbird that could fly a mile in a drop. One morning, a heavy fog floated down the meadow. Ruby's nose twitched. That's strange, she thought. But she wasn't frightened. She hopped along.

As she did, she noticed that the fog made everything look dreamy. A tiny, sparkling pond with fishes that glittered like tiny stars appeared out of the fog. Ruby jumped into it. She floated up higher. She looked down. That's not water. It's a quilt!

She drifted along until she reached an enormous pile of quilts. Each quilt was warm to the touch. Every single one. She hopped onto one and fell asleep. When she dreamt, it was of a beautiful island.
